programme.title: Columbo: Uneasy Lies the Crown (1990)
programme.desc: A dentist with gambling debts discovers his wife is having an affair with one of his patients and wants a divorce. He plans to take revenge by poisoning the lover with his wife's heart medication, so she will be suspected - but he reckons without the attentions of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, James Read, Paul Burke, Jo Anderson and Nancy Walker

programme.title: Columbo Cries Wolf (1990)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth suspects the owner of a men's magazine is behind the strange disappearance of his business partner and former lover. The suspect insists the woman is still alive, while the detective struggles to prove his guilt owing to the absence of a body. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ian Buchanan, Rebecca Staab, Deidre Hall and Alan Scarfe

programme.title: Columbo: Lady in Waiting (1971)
programme.desc: A desperate woman is determined to rid herself of her domineering brother and gain control of the family business, so hatches a plan to shoot him and claim she thought he was a burglar. Although her plan seems to have worked, her new-found power goes to her head - and she also has to contend with Columbo, who is convinced of her guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leslie Nielsen and Susan Clark

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly

programme.title: Columbo: Lovely but Lethal (1973)
programme.desc: A cosmetics company is rocked by the revelation that a pirated version of their latest product is on the market, and then, shortly afterwards, one of their chemists is found murdered. But when the shabby sleuth scrutinises the case, he suspects the events are linked to a rival company. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Vincent Price, Martin Sheen and Vera Miles

programme.title: Columbo: Mind Over Mayhem (1974)
programme.desc: A scientist is overjoyed when his son follows in his footsteps, receiving widespread acclaim for a revolutionary new theory. When a fellow boffin produces evidence of plagiarism, the ruthless father resorts to murder to save his son from a scandal. But he reckons without the dishevelled detective, who sees through his efforts to make the killing look like the work of burglars. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Jose Ferrer and Lew Ayres

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige

programme.title: Columbo: Ransom for a Dead Man (1971)
programme.desc: A devious lawyer hatches the perfect murder plot - she kills her husband, tells the police he has been kidnapped and leaves the body at the ransom drop, making it look like the criminals who abducted him finished him off. However, the crumpled cop sees through her ruse and begins picking apart her story in his inimitable manner. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Lee Grant and Patricia Mattick

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and the team investigate the death of a prostitute at a pop-up brothel. The detectives contemplate if there was foul play was at work or whether this could be a case of a junkie who relapsed, turned to tricking, got depressed and committed suicide. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and the SVU team investigate the death of a man they believe to be a pedophile. When they dig deeper, they realise things are not what they seem, and as matters progress the case actually hits quite close to home. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team investigate the murder of a college student, focusing their inquiry on his best friend, who has been printing counterfeit money - but evidence suggests another party may have been involved. Meanwhile, Jo feels anxious about meeting her son's new room-mate and Danny deals with additional strain on his marriage

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The son of a Russian diplomat is murdered and during the investigation Castle entertains a jovial security guard who turns out to be more involved in the case than expected

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author and Beckett are abducted and forced to solve twisted puzzles with strangers, while Alexis and the rest of the team race to save them

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Exhausted by a European book tour, Jessica stops off to see an old friend who owns a luxurious Monte Carlo hotel, but it is not long before a murderer checks in. Ian Ogilvy guest stars, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine helicopter is discovered abandoned in a crop circle with its pilots missing, and witnesses report seeing strange lights in the night sky, adding to the intrigue surrounding the case. Gibbs orders the sightings to be kept under wraps for fear of attracting the attention of UFO enthusiasts, before uncovering a dark secret involving local residents. Guest starring Timothy Bottoms (The Last Picture Show)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into the rape and murder of a woman revives harrowing memories for Ducky, who once worked on a similar case in which the killer was never captured and vowed to return. Bafflingly, both victims were civilians dressed in the uniform of a lieutenant, and each had a trident symbol carved into their neck. Starring Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-level insurance executive is murdered, and suspicion soon falls on the father of a dying nine-year-old whose claim for a life-saving leukaemia treatment was turned down. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two room-mates are found bludgeoned to death in their flat, and the handyman is the prime suspect. As his options run out, he takes a hostage, forcing Southerlyn into a course of action that could jeopardise her career. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Gene Silvers, and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is attacked and killed just hours after a serial rapist is freed on parole, prompting McCoy to pull out all the stops to bring him to justice - but before long the detective realises the wanted man could be innocent. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The wife of a zealous defence lawyer is found dead in her car, but Briscoe and Green suspect the victim's husband was the real target, and set off on the trail of a former client - a convict who sent him threatening letters from jail. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a woman whose scantily clad body is found on the Upper East Side. Initially believing her to be a prostitute, they learn she was a doctor who had been handing out unauthorised doses of a powerful drug. The hunt for her killer leads the team into a web of deceit and blackmail, with a Russian mobster and his son seemingly pulling the strings

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis discover a man leading a secret double life when they investigate who opened fire on a group of people disembarking from a party cruise. A major dispute erupts when Schiff confronts the governor and attorney general over the decision to seek the death penalty. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An accident at a Navy bombing range brings to light an area used by the Mafia to dump bodies. One of the corpses is identified as a missing FBI agent, so the team investigates the events leading up to his death. Crime drama, guest starring Joe Spano, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team find themselves in deep trouble with the FBI as they try to protect a veteran naval officer who has caught the attention of an al-Qaeda cell. A breakthrough convinces them they have discovered the bomber targeting her, but things are not quite as they seem. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine veteran confesses to the murder of a friend 60 years previously, but Gibbs decides to investigate further rather than take his story at face value, hoping to save the elderly Medal of Honour recipient from a spell in prison. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Vance is notified by the Pentagon that the nuclear submarine Gibbs and Bishop are aboard to conduct a murder investigation has gone radio silent. Ducky officially retires as Chief Medical Examiner and becomes the historian and archivist of NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a computer company employee, and gradually conclude the blame lies with code-writer Robbie, who is undergoing a course of unconventional treatment with his psychiatrist Dr Pynchon. Digging deeper, they discover the therapist's bizarre methods could be a motivating factor in the crime

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek are called to investigate the murder of a businessman, and follow a trail of clues leading to a serial blackmailer who wrongly told the victim he was the father of her child. Further inquiries reveal she is conning other men with the same claim - but they refuse to testify against her. With guest star Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and his team are puzzled when a woman's body is found in a Ferrari, until they discover she was part of a car-theft ring and may have unknowingly stolen a vehicle belonging to one of the world's most wanted criminals. Crime drama, starring Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny gets into an altercation that leads to a brawl when he is out drinking with some of his team-mates. He is knocked unconscious, and comes round to find an undercover officer has shot his assailant dead, claiming the man had a gun. As he begins to doubt his leadership abilities, his career is put at risk when evidence suggests he lied about the facts of the case. Crime drama, starring Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and the team investigate the murder of a student learning English as a second language and Castle goes undercover as a French-Canadian immigrant when the victim's classmates refuse to talk to the police

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author returns to Los Angeles to find out more about the missing time related to his abduction, and The Greatest Detective Society requests his assistance in solving a murder

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits London, where she is introduced to an MP, a meeting that proves to be the kiss of death for the unfortunate fellow. However, the mystery surrounding his murder deepens as the corpse goes missing only to reappear with a new identity. Whodunit, guest starring Trevor Eve and Sharon Maughan

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team find themselves in deep trouble with the FBI as they try to protect a veteran naval officer who has caught the attention of an al-Qaeda cell. A breakthrough convinces them they have discovered the bomber targeting her, but things are not quite as they seem. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine veteran confesses to the murder of a friend 60 years previously, but Gibbs decides to investigate further rather than take his story at face value, hoping to save the elderly Medal of Honour recipient from a spell in prison. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. Their progress is hindered by a lack of evidence, but when her body is found in a marsh, the case turns into a murder inquiry. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. With the events of September 11 still fresh in everyone's minds, McCoy tries to find a way of ensuring the jury's fears and prejudices do not influence their verdict. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal shooting of two professors, which occurred soon after one of the academics campaigned against the treatment of women in the Middle East. Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pizza delivery man is murdered, causing trouble when the two suspects point the finger at the other. Though one of the pair is taped admitting to the crime, his Catholic priest uncle forbids the team from violating the sanctity of the Confessional. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team arrest an ensign in connection with the death of a Navy commander who had recently undergone surgery, but Abby believes they have got the wrong man. Another fatality soon follows - and it falls to Tony to save his colleagues. Starring Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine's wife kills an intruder and later claims he tried to rape her. The team embarks on a mystifying wild goose chase through a stack of old case files and eventually discovers the woman was leading a double life while her husband was serving overseas

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony poses as a convict and takes part in a bogus jailbreak as part of an undercover operation to recover millions of dollars' worth of art and archaeological finds looted from Iraq - but disappears while manacled to a murderous fellow inmate. Guest starring Frank Whaley (Pulp Fiction), with Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the death of a woman searching for the whereabouts of her late mother's antique ring. Their trail leads to a deadly doctor who has cleverly concealed the murders of many of his patients. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A married couple are found dead in their hotel room, the husband having succumbed to an overdose. Eames and Goren discover a link to professional party service owner Bernard Fremont, who is suspected of using a team of women to befriend tourists before robbing and killing them. Michael York guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A prostitute's body is found in the ocean, having seemingly fallen from an aeroplane's wheel well - leading Logan and Barek to conclude an airline employee may be to blame. Their investigation leads them to a nervous staff member, but they soon conclude he is too timid to have committed such a crime, and believe someone else may be involved. With special guest star Brad Renfro

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman is stabbed to death in her flat, and suspicion initially falls on her boyfriend Hank, a known drug addict trying to sort his life out after being released from prison on parole. His brother Riley, a high-school basketball prodigy, is furious his sibling has let him down in their joint dream of becoming sports stars, but as evidence emerges, it becomes clear to Sid, Hawkes and the team that while Hank may be troubled, he is not a killer. Crime drama, starring Robert Joy and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A fraternity house's initiation ritual turns deadly when a student is killed and another disappears. The detectives discover the deceased man was carrying four mobile phones and that he was the mastermind behind the games, leading them to a cemetery and a sinister money-making scheme

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The team investigates when a recruiting officer at the NYPD Academy is killed, while Castle makes a decision with profound consequences for him and Beckett

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: One of Esposito's old cases is re-examined by Castle and Beckett because of a clue left at a crime scene involving the murder of an armoured car driver. Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic star

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to see how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Footage includes communities fighting back as neighbourhood watch takes on new meaning, thugs on a housing estate caught in the act, and an elderly resident attacking an intruder with her walking stick

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Manjit and Cathy Jandu have recently retired from their medical practice and are ready for a new environment. Inspired by their son who lived in Madrid for a year, they've decided Spain is for them and are determined to buy a villa around Estepona on the Costa del Sol. With £300,000 to find the perfect property, Jonnie Irwin sets out to locate and show them five homes to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Recently divorced Patricia Malty from Devon wants to make a fresh start on the Costa Calida in Spain after selling her home and moving in with her best friend, with Laura Hamilton helping her find suitable properties for her £90,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Recently retired couple Nick and Jane Purser are looking forward to settling down, but cannot decide where that should be. Jane's mother lives in Liverpool, so she would prefer to stay close by with a move to Lancaster. Nick wants them to move to southern France, where he can ride his motorbike in the sun. Jasmine Harman shows the pair three properties in Lancaster for up to £180,000 and Jonnie Irwin tempts them with three properties for up to £145,000 in France

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: When her partner of 20 years died, Ginny Lunn decided to find a holiday home where she could create new memories. Torn between buying a place in Dorset within easy reach of her London home for a budget of £250,000, and the Costa Tropical in Spain, where she would have a budget of £150,000, she requires help. Jasmine Harman shows her three options in Dorset, and Laura Hamilton tries to impress her with three properties in Spain, but, with the help of her sister Sara, which one will Ginny choose?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Juliette and Jonathan Cottam are selling their London home to retire elsewhere, but are torn between two very different locations. Juliette dreams of a life in France, where she spent much of her childhood. With a budget of £250,000, she thinks the Dordogne region would be the perfect location. Jonathan wants to stay in the UK with a budget of up to £350,000 and move to Devon where he grew up. Jasmine Harman tempts Juliette with three properties in Devon, while Lara Hamilton shows them three fantastic French homes

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw both find unusual powder compacts, making for an exciting auction in Brighton. Paul also visits a mosque and Kate tries gardening, Victorian-style

The duo later head for an auction in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

Meanwhile, Natasha Raskin Sharp visits the world's oldest lift shaft

programme.title: Cash in the Spare Room

programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialise. Meanwhile, a mother and daughter have bonded over their bodies

Laverne is worried both by Ioan's violence and by Emma's use of restraints, so she institutes a new bedtime routine, and helps Adrian to strengthen his relationship with Ioan by getting out of the house and doing outdoor activities

After growing up in Wales with her single mother and only finding out about her father's identity at the age of 19, Miriam is desperate to find him. Meanwhile, 48-year-old Annie Sims is determined to find her birth mother, who gave her up for adoption as a baby, but kept her older sister. Following the birth of her own daughters, Annie's compassion for her biological mother has grown, and she hopes to find her and hear her side of the story. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.desc: The North West Ambulance Service face a busy Friday night shift, with call centre manager Saj concerned there are not enough ambulances for all the patients that need them. The situation is made worse when news comes through of a house fire, with teams from lower-priority jobs diverted to the scene. Elsewhere, crew-mates Ellie and Ian are dispatched to a 63-year-old with breathing problems, a man with cancer makes a big decision about his treatment and a patient in alcohol withdrawal is suffering seizures

programme.desc: The Houston SPCA rescues two mistreated horses from a waterlogged paddock, and a golden retriever has a mysterious itch

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees

programme.title: Money for Nothing

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton's search for antiques takes them from Buckinghamshire to the Cotswolds, along the way finding out about codebreakers of the Second World War

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The ceramicists return to Stoke-on-Trent for week two of the ceramics challenge, with judges Keith Brymer Jones and Kate Malone setting them three more tasks to show who is best at working with clay. They begin by throwing a double-walled pot on the wheel, then for the spot test they have to create handles for a set of casserole dishes. Finally, the main challenge sees them making a large clock, which involves slab rolling large amounts of clay to shape, then raw glazing and firing them to produce what they hope will be beautiful timepieces. But for one hopeful, this will have been their last day in the contest. Host Sara Cox breaks the bad news

programme.desc: An officer's hunch helps catch a wanted man, while in Weston, the team responds to a report of mini motos causing a nuisance, however it is unclear who owns the bikes. Elsewhere, the police team up with Trading Standards in a bid to remove legal highs from the shops and streets of Somerset, and an officer chases a bus to catch a criminal who smashed up an arcade

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Return of the show in which Dominic Littlewood reveals the innovative methods the police and members of the public are using to catch criminals in the act. In the first edition, CCTV cameras are used in a bid to help identify someone who has been making hoax calls to the emergency services, and the presenter meets an angry daughter who has hatched a clever plan to catch the carer she believes has been stealing from her parents

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Secret Army

programme.title: Spring and Port Wine (1970)
programme.desc: A tyrannically strict Lancashire father brings about the downfall of his family by forcing his daughter to eat a meal against her will. Drama, starring James Mason, Diana Coupland, Susan George and Rodney Bewes

programme.title: The Best of Men
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the birth of the Paralympics in 1948. Pioneering neurologist Dr Ludwig Guttmann arrives at Stoke Mandeville Hospital in Buckinghamshire and begins to transform the lives of his patients - Second World War servicemen with spinal cord injuries. He suggests using sport as a key part of their rehabilitation, and gets them involved in activities including wheelchair polo and basketball. Starring Eddie Marsan, Rob Brydon, George Mackay and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: The Face at the Window (1939)
programme.desc: In 1880, Paris is terrorised by a hideous murderer. An innocent man is accused of being the killer by a respected aristocrat who longs to get him out of the way so he can seduce his fiancee - but may also have other reasons for wanting a scapegoat. Horror, starring Tod Slaughter and John Warwick

programme.title: The Getting of Wisdom (1977)
programme.desc: A snobbish Victorian college for young ladies is thrown into disarray by the arrival of a strong-willed girl from the Outback. Australian drama, starring Barry Humphries, Susannah Fowle, John Waters and Terence Donovan

programme.title: The Slipper and the Rose (1976)
programme.desc: A girl is reduced to being the downtrodden servant of her cruel stepmother after her father's death. With a little help from her fairy godmother, she wins the heart of a handsome prince, who is desperately trying to avoid being forced into a political marriage by his parents. Musical version of Cinderella, starring Gemma Craven and Richard Chamberlain

programme.title: Obsessed with My Body
programme.desc: With British boys now apparently spending 30 per cent more time in the bathroom than teenage girls and taking twice as many selfies, this documentary follows some of those in search of the perfect body. From bodybuilding and eyebrow waxing to make-up, the film also examines how far they will they go to achieve perfection. And what happens when things are taken to extremes?

Drama, starring Robbie Coltrane and Julie Walters

programme.desc: Student chef Robin and his two female flatmates discover the council is planning to demolish the terrace where they live. Movie version of the 1970s sitcom, starring Richard O'Sullivan, Paula Wilcox, Sally Thomsett, Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy

programme.desc: Easy care, easy wear, easy elegance in this mix and match collection of unique and versatile pieces created for the smart, elegant, busy women seeking comfort that doesn't compromise style

programme.title: Tanning at Home
programme.desc: Join us and discover a host of great tanning products from some of your favourite brands, plus expert tips to help you achieve a streak-free, natural-looking glow at home

programme.title: Michelle Mone for Diamonique
programme.desc: Successful entrepreneur Michelle Mone has collaborated with Diamonique to create aspirational designs inspired by her glamorous jet-set lifestyle - at a fraction of the cost of real diamonds.

programme.title: My Hair Doctor
programme.desc: Join us for My Hair Doctor from Guy Parsons, an industry professional whose knowledge of hair and scalp health, plus his hairdressing skills has enabled him to create this premium haircare range

programme.title: Tarte Cosmetics
programme.desc: This show features high performance natural products from Tarte Cosmetics, including everything from Amazonian clay to maracuja oil

programme.title: Dune Footwear
programme.desc: Starting on London's Oxford Street in 1992, Dune is an influential, dynamic and internationally-renowned footwear and accessories brand, with London heritage at the heart of what they do

programme.title: Nails Inc
programme.desc: A show of hot seasonal colours, classic manicure favourites and unique nail care solutions from Nails Inc

programme.title: Ruth Langsford Fashion
programme.desc: Tune in for style advice and inspiration from Ruth, plus find everything from a great pair of jeans and a stylish jacket, to chic pieces featuring pops of colour and vibrant print.

programme.title: Beauty Loves with Nails Inc
programme.desc: Beauty lovers; tune in to see our exciting array of popular and iconic brands, including gorgeous polishes from Nails Inc. Find cult products you're sure to adore

programme.title: WULI: LUU by Gok Wan

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the Second Test at the Etihad Stadium in Melbourne, as the Lions aimed to clinch the 2013 series after winning a thrilling First Test 23-21. The Lions suffered their heaviest defeat on this ground during the 2001 tour, as the Aussies overturned a half-time deficit to run away 35-14 victors. With just one Test remaining, the result here will determine whether there is anything riding on next Saturday's final showdown

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v Sri Lanka. Highlights of the opening day of the First Test in the two-match series, which takes place at Lord's. When these sides faced each other in a Test match here in 2011 it finished in a draw, with both teams posting a first innings total in excess of 450

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v Sri Lanka. Highlights of the second day of the First Test in the two-match series, which takes place at Lord's. Five of England's batsmen recorded first-innings scores of over 50 when the sides met here in 2011, with Matt Prior's 126 the standout performance, especially with him coming to the crease with the score on 201-5

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v South Africa. Highlights of the opening day's play in the 2017 First Test, which took place at Lord's

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from the second day of the Second Test at Lord's, where the five-match series continued. Stuart Broad recorded a career-best 7-44 in a man-of-the-match second-innings performance against New Zealand here two months ago, while James Anderson became only the fourth Englishman to surpass 300 Test wickets when taking 5-47 in the first innings

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from the third day of the Second Test at Lord's, where the five-match series continued. Then-England captain Andrew Strauss produced a fine first-innings knock of 161 when the sides last met here in this format in 2009 and the hosts went on to win by 115 runs, a victory that meant they finally ended their long winless run in Tests against the Aussies at this venue that spanned all the way back to 1934

programme.desc: Manchester United v Fulham (Kick-off 6.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Old Trafford, as both teams play their penultimate game of the league season. The reverse fixture in January saw the Red Devils come from behind to take all three points, with goals from Edinson Cavani and Paul Pogba cancelling out an early goal from Ademola Lookman. That win saw Ole Gunnar Solksjaer's side extend their unbeaten away record in the Premier League to 17 games.
